raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A review of the section centrally involves checking whether the argument from curvature feedback to adaptive refinement and preliminary usefulness is internally coherent.","R1.3":"The section makes empirical claims about benchmark performance and overhead, so reviewing it requires checking whether those claims align with the reported evidence.","R1.6":"Because the delegation asks to review a written section, sentence-level clarity, register, hedging, and concision are central responsibilities.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve awareness of uncertainty in the preliminary empirical and theoretical claims.","RX.2":"The review responsibility includes avoiding stronger claims than the section's reported experiments and caveats support.","RX.3":"The task is limited to projecting review responsibilities rather than editing, summarizing, or executing the review.","RX.4":"The projection should account for avoiding downstream misuse of tentative optimization results as established guarantees.","RX.5":"The responsibility assignment should remain traceable to explicit features of the delegation and artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A review of the section centrally involves checking whether the argument from curvature feedback to adaptive refinement and preliminary usefulness is internally coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The section makes empirical claims about benchmark performance and overhead, so reviewing it requires checking whether those claims align with the reported evidence.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation asks to review a written section, sentence-level clarity, register, hedging, and concision are central responsibilities.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve awareness of uncertainty in the preliminary empirical and theoretical claims.
rationale.RX.2: The review responsibility includes avoiding stronger claims than the section's reported experiments and caveats support.
rationale.RX.3: The task is limited to projecting review responsibilities rather than editing, summarizing, or executing the review.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should account for avoiding downstream misuse of tentative optimization results as established guarantees.
rationale.RX.5: The responsibility assignment should remain traceable to explicit features of the delegation and artifact.
